forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: Stable; multiple labs approaching thresholds but no new breakthroughs
forecasts.base_rate: Expert surveys ~25% median for AGI by early 2030s; Samotsvety 28%
factors_up: OpenAI GPT-5.4 with autonomous task execution
factors_down: No lab has announced AGI despite predictions
key_uncertainties: AGI definition alignment with resolution criteria
Whether labs will claim AGI vs 'powerful AI'

forecasts.question: Will economic consultancy lose ≥33% value/jobs by end 2030 due to AI?
forecasts.key_change: McKinsey 10% cuts; graduate hiring down; but AI advisory revenue growing
forecasts.base_rate: Industry disruptions rarely cause >33% job losses within 6 years
key_uncertainties: Whether AI productivity gains accelerate post-2027
Client willingness to pay for AI-augmented consulting

forecasts.question: Will Labour be largest party at next UK General Election?
forecasts.key_change: Reform lead steady; Labour at 18-21% but FPTP provides some path
forecasts.base_rate: Incumbent Labour at 18-21% after 15 months; Reform leads at 23-28%
key_uncertainties: FPTP seat conversion in fragmented race

forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2035?
forecasts.key_change: No new breakthroughs; time decay; Metaculus 50% by 2033

forecasts.question: Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: US ODNI: China unlikely to invade 2027; PLAAF at historic lows; Trump-Xi talks scheduled
forecasts.base_rate: Taiwan Strait crises ~once per decade; direct invasion unprecedented post-1950

forecasts.question: Will UK annual CPI inflation fall below 2.0% for at least one month before 1 January 2027?
forecasts.key_change: Middle East conflict worsened energy outlook; BoE revised to 3-3.5%; April dip still possible
forecasts.base_rate: UK CPI breaches 2% ~40-50% of the time historically
factors_down: Middle East conflict raised energy risks

forecasts.question: Will Spider-Man: Brand New Day gross over $1.5B worldwide by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: 1.1B trailer views total; 718.6M in 24hrs (2x record); July summer release
forecasts.base_rate: No Way Home $1.921B; MCU films above $1.5B increasingly common
factors_down: No Way Home was pandemic anomaly

forecasts.question: Will OpenAI and Anthropic have a combined ARR exceeding $70B by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: Combined ARR ~$44B (OpenAI $25B, Anthropic $19B); need 59% growth over 9 months
forecasts.base_rate: Unprecedented scaling speed; both growing >100% YoY

forecasts.question: Will UK average annual real GDP growth exceed 1.5% across the 2030s (2030-2039)?
forecasts.key_change: OBR potential at 1.5% (threshold); AI upside offset by structural constraints
forecasts.base_rate: UK long-term potential output growth: 1.5% (OBR); 2010s average ~1.5%
factors_up: PwC: AI fuels 43% of UK growth by 2032
factors_down: 60% of businesses expect no AI impact
